quantification_methods: MS1 intensity based label-free quantification method
keywords: Correlation of mrna and protein abundance

publications.ref: Frejno M, Zenezini Chiozzi R, Wilhelm M, Koch H, Zheng R, Klaeger S, Ruprecht B, Meng C, Kramer K, Jarzab A, Heinzlmeir S, Johnstone E, Domingo E, Kerr D, Jesinghaus M, Slotta-Huspenina J, Weichert W, Knapp S, Feller SM, Kuster B. Pharmacoproteomic characterisation of human colon and rectal cancer. Mol Syst Biol. 2017 13(11):951

Characteristics[OrganismPart].evidence: human colon and rectal cancer, colorectal cancer (CRC) cell lines, CRC patients

Characteristics[Disease].evidence: colorectal cancer (CRC) cell lines, CRC patients, human colon and rectal cancer

Characteristics[Label].evidence: MS1 intensity based label-free quantification method

Characteristics[CellLine].reasoning: 論文では65のCRC細胞株を使用していることが明記されているが、具体的な細胞株名（HT29、SW480等）は抽出できない
Characteristics[CellLine].needs: methods sectionでの具体的な細胞株名のリスト

Characteristics[Treatment].reasoning: 52のCRC細胞株に対して577の薬物を用いた薬物感受性試験が実施されているが、具体的な処理条件は不明
Characteristics[Treatment].needs: 薬物処理の詳細な実験条件

STEP1_OVERVIEW.summary: ヒト大腸直腸癌65細胞株を対象としたラベルフリーショットガンプロテオミクス研究であることが確定。疾患は大腸直腸癌、材料タイプは細胞株。薬物感受性試験も実施されているが、具体的な細胞株名や薬物処理条件は未確定。患者サンプル90例も使用されているが、プロテオミクス解析の主体は細胞株。

Characteristics[CleavageAgent].evidence: proteins were digested overnight at 37°C and 700 rpm in a thermomixer using trypsin (Roche) at a protease‐to‐protein ratio of 1:50

Characteristics[ReductionReagent].evidence: 3.5 mg of TCL per sample was reduced with 10 mM DTT

Characteristics[Label].evidence: MS1 intensity based label-free quantification method

Comment[FractionationMethod].evidence: For hydrophilic strong anion exchange (hSAX) chromatography, peptide solutions were first dried down in a Speed‐Vac, re‐solubilised in hSAX solvent A

Comment[NumberOfFractions].evidence: We started collecting 48 fractions of 250 μl after 2 min of gradient time, which were subsequently combined to form 24 fractions after consulting the 214‐nm chromatography trace

Comment[Separation].evidence: Full proteome fractions were measured using nanoflow LC‐MS/MS... Subsequently, peptides were separated on a 40‐cm analytical column (75 μm i.d., ReproSil‐Gold 120 C18 3 μm, Dr. Maisch) using a flow rate of 300 nl/min

Comment[EnrichmentMethod].evidence: Kinobeads gamma (KBγ) pulldowns (biological triplicates) were performed in 96‐well filter plates

Characteristics[Modification].reasoning: MaxQuantの設定で可変修飾として明記されているが、実際にどの修飾が検出されたかは不明
Characteristics[Modification].needs: 実際に検出された修飾の詳細情報

STEP2_SAMPLE_PREP.summary: サンプル調製では10mM DTTによる還元、55mM chloroacetamideによるアルキル化、trypsinによる酵素消化が確定。hSAX分画により24フラクションに分離し、逆相LC-MS/MSで測定。Kinobeadsを用いたキナーゼエンリッチメントも実施。ラベルフリー定量。可変修飾の候補は判明したが実際の検出修飾は未確定。

Comment[Instrument].evidence: Full proteome fractions were measured using nanoflow LC-MS/MS by directly coupling an Eksigent nanoLC-Ultra 1D+ (Eksigent) to an Orbitrap Velos mass spectrometer (Thermo Fisher)

Comment[FragmentationMethod].evidence: fragmentation using higher-energy collisional dissociation (HCD) at 30% normalised collision energy

Comment[AcquisitionMethod].evidence: The Orbitrap Velos was set to data-dependent acquisition in positive ion mode, automatically selecting the top 10 most intense precursor ions

Comment[IonizationType].evidence: The eluate from the analytical column was sprayed via stainless steel emitters (Thermo) at a source voltage of 2.6 kV towards the orifice of the mass spectrometer

Comment[MS2MassAnalyzer].evidence: MS1 (360–1,300 m/z) and MS2 (precursor-dependent m/z range, starting at m/z 100) spectra were acquired in the Orbitrap using a resolution of 30,000 and 7,500 at m/z 400

Comment[CollisionEnergy].evidence: fragmentation using higher-energy collisional dissociation (HCD) at 30% normalised collision energy

Comment[PrecursorMassTolerance].evidence: After recalibration, the data were searched with a precursor ion tolerance of 4.5 ppm

Comment[FragmentMassTolerance].evidence: The fragment ion tolerance was set to 20 ppm for FTMS (CRC65)

Comment[NumberOfMissedCleavages].evidence: We set the digestion mode to fully tryptic, allowing for cleavage before proline (Trypsin/P) and a maximum of two missed cleavages

Comment[GradientTime].evidence: a gradient from 2% buffer B (0.1% FA and 5% DMSO in ACN) to 4% in 2 min (buffer A now also contained 5% DMSO) and from 4 to 32% in 96 min

Comment[FlowRateChromatogram].evidence: Subsequently, peptides were separated on a 40-cm analytical column (75 μm i.d., ReproSil-Gold 120 C18 3 μm, Dr. Maisch) using a flow rate of 300 nl/min

STEP3_MS_SETTINGS.summary: LTQ Orbitrap Velosによる質量分析測定パラメータが完全に確定。DDAモード、HCD断片化（30%衝突エネルギー）、OrbitrapによるMS2分析、4.5ppm前駆体質量許容度、20ppmフラグメント質量許容度、最大2回切断欠損、96分グラディエント時間、300nl/min流量が明確に記載されている。Kinobeads実験では別装置（Orbitrap Elite）も使用されているが、メインのフルプロテオーム解析はOrbitrap Velosで実施。

Comment[FractionIdentifier].per_file: N01-N24 based on filename pattern S00_Nxx
Comment[FractionIdentifier].evidence: Rawファイル名に含まれるS00_N01からS00_N24のパターンが24フラクションと一致。例: 01245_A04_P012911_S00_N01_R1.raw, 00108_H03_P012694_S00_N24_R1.raw

Characteristics[NumberOfSamples].evidence: All cell lines in the CRC65 panel

Characteristics[NumberOfBiologicalReplic.evidence: フルプロテオーム解析では生物学的反復の記載なし。Kinobeadsのみ(biological triplicates)で3反復

Characteristics[NumberOfTechnicalReplica.evidence: 各フルプロテオームサンプルは24フラクションに分割されているが、技術的反復の記載なし

FactorValue[Treatment].reasoning: Cell viability assaysで1% DMSO controlと577薬物処理が記載されているが、プロテオミクス実験での処理は明確でない
FactorValue[Treatment].needs: フルプロテオミクス実験での薬物処理の有無

FactorValue[Disease].reasoning: CRC65パネルは大腸直腸癌細胞株だが、individual cell lineレベルでの疾患分類は不明
FactorValue[Disease].needs: 各細胞株の具体的な癌種分類

FactorValue[CellPart].reasoning: RIPA100 bufferでtotal cell lysates (TCLs)を調製と記載
FactorValue[CellPart].needs: 細胞内区画の分離の有無確認

STEP4_RAW_FILES.summary: Rawファイル名からフラクション番号(N01-N24)が確定。CRC65細胞株パネル65サンプルの単回測定が確認された。薬物処理の可能性があるが、プロテオミクス実験での具体的な処理条件は未確定。各ファイルの具体的なサンプル割り当てや処理条件は追加情報が必要。
